# Sitemap for LLMs
# This file helps AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude) discover your content

## Site Overview
https://werner.bisschoff.dev - Werner Bisschoff's personal portfolio
https://werner.bisschoff.dev/resume - Professional resume
https://werner.bisschoff.dev/work - Case studies and selected work
https://werner.bisschoff.dev/contact - Contact information

## About
Werner Bisschoff is a Software Engineer based in Cape Town, South Africa with a B.Eng. in Computer and Electronic Engineering. Specializes in testing infrastructure, development tooling, and system architecture.

## Expertise
- Agentic Engineering & AI Integration: Agentic Workflows, Claude Code, Spec-Driven TDD, Prompt Engineering
- Systems Architecture: Event-Driven FSMs, RPC/IPC, State Machines
- Embedded Systems: ESP32/ESP-IDF, FreeRTOS, NimBLE
- Web Development: ReactJS, AstroJS, Django REST API, TailwindCSS, Phoenix
- Testing & Quality: Unit Testing (Pytest), Hardware Mocks, CI/CD
- Languages: C/C++, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, SQL, Elixir
- Cloud: AWS (Pulumi, Inngest, PayloadCMS), Docker

## Employment History
- Founder and Host at Divergent Tabletop (Jul 2025 -- Present)
- Full-Stack Software Engineer at FARO Africa (Aug 2024 -- Nov 2025)
- Embedded Software Engineer at Ingenics Digital GmbH (Mar 2023 -- May 2024)
- Software Developer at UMAN Technologies (Mar 2021 -- Dec 2022)

## Availability
Open to freelance, contract, part-time, full-time, and remote work opportunities in Cape Town or internationally.

## Contact
